titleStmt.title: SII 27.414: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 414. (A.R. No. 524 of 1928-29.) SHIRTĀḌI, KARKAL TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in front of Baidarkal Bhūtanātha.
This record is dated Śaka 1453 Vikṛiti, Mēśa 15, Sunday corresponding to 1530 A.D., April 11 when the Śaka year was current and the weekday Monday.

It states that Dēvaṇṇa-arasa alias Koṁna got a new temple (of Sōmanātha 7) constructed at Ārjunāpura and made a gift of 75 varāha-gadyāṇas to Koṭyaṇa-āḷva for conducting worship in the temple. It also records a gift of tax-free land to the deity by Chennarāja-oḍeya. Ramasēnabōva wrote the record.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
ṁ svastiśrīmatu . vijeyobhyudaya sālivā
hanasakāvarusa . saviradā . nanura Aivattamū
reneya . vartamanada . yikrutisavacārada .
mēsāmāsada . hadinaidāneya . Ādivāradaṁdu
dēvaṁṇa Ārāsarāda koṁnarā kō la vāu Uḷi
dhaṁ baḷiyā . kōṭyaṁṇa Āḷvage barasikoṭṭu . si
la sāśanada krama Eṁtiyādare kalliṭṭamūḍe nāḍi bāḷisi
Ārasu pradhani . mūvaru sāmaṁttaru . Ānāḍu Āi
saravarā . sēnābōva mēnāyā . sāmasta relāraṟa
samathadiṁ Ārjināpurada . dēvālyavanuge
yisi hostagi kaṭṭisi prāthiṭṭeyaṁmāḍi . Āstānakke
hiḍi honnina veccavarāha ga 75 Akṣaradu E
ppattu Aidu . Ākōṭyaṇa Āḷvaru baḷuva Ākkadalu
Ārasa �yovaruṣa 1 kaṁ bhata ba ramūḍe 2
nu ceṁnnarāja Oḍeyāru dēvarige dhamātra va
māḍidaru . Ā kōṭyaṁṇa Āḷvage kīrtipuṁṇyavanu
māḍikoṁḍu . Ātana baḷu . kapaḷu . samathyage . bi
ḍisaraku . biḍarā saladu Eṁdu sarvamānyavanu māḍi
koṁḍu . hākistaṁtā silāśāsanakke baṁnāṇiṁ baḷiyama
Iṁda heggaḍe Uḷidaṁ baḷiyā Ire caḷvuvasa kudaṁ
bilā bhayiraṇa kurikāra kāṁtu mēleṁṭṭaru Iṁtvī

maṁnyavanu maḍikoṁḍu
hakistaṁta silāsāśanake biṁnā
ṇi baḷiya maiṁda hegaḍe . Uḷidaṁ baḷi
yā . Ire caḷvuvanu kūḍaṁbelā bayiraṇa . kuri
kārakāṁtu mēlaṁṭaru . Iṁtivara bhayāṁmna
thadiṁda . nāḍastaḷadiṁda . ramasēnābhōvana baraha
sōmanāthana saraṇu . maṁgaḷa mahā
śrī śrī śrī .
Digital edition of SII 27.414 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
